match.userMessage:
Steady handheld tracking follows Scarlett forward through the open studio doorway into bright morning street light, her right hand slipping the coral lipstick tube into the pocket of her linen shorts at the threshold. Natural micro-movements maintain eye-level framing as she advances onto sunlit pavement with crisp directional shadows stretching ahead. Light fabric shifts on her clothing and subtle hair movement enhance the airy outdoor transition.

bright morning urban street with distant waves and soft wind. soft fabric rustle, footsteps on pavement.

Single continuous shot, no cuts. Avoid jitter and bent limbs.
